description_long: This is a detached brick house surrounded by a tall, dense hedge and a wooden fence, creating a private yard. The house features a complex, multi-gabled white roof and symmetrical brick facades with regularly spaced rectangular windows. There is a covered carport on one side, paved driveways, and a small patio area, all enclosed within the fenced property. The front facade includes a central entryway with a small overhang and a circular window above the door. The yard is mostly grass, with the hedge providing a natural barrier on all sides. The overall design is suburban and functional, with a focus on privacy and outdoor space.
description: A brick house with a white multi-gabled roof, surrounded by a tall hedge and wooden fence, featuring a carport, paved driveways, and a private grassy yard.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, carport to the left, and the symmetrical hedge and fence enclosing the property.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the brick facade, multiple windows, and the expanse of the grassy yard within the hedge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, paved driveway, and the hedge and fence enclosing the property.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the secondary entry, windows, and the continuation of the hedge and fence.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with small overhang, steps, and a circular window above; no porch or columns.
